name: Tarragon-Mustard Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare grill or preheat broiler.
2. In a medium bowl, combine chicken or turkey, tomato paste, dried tarragon, salt, and black pepper. Form into 4-5 burgers.
3. Grill or broil the burgers for 4-6 minutes on each side until cooked through and spring back to touch.
4. Place a slice of tomato and a burger on top of each muffin half.
5. Top with warm Tarragon-Mustard sauce (recipe below).
6. Serve, garnished with sprigs of fresh tarragon if desired.
Tarragon-Mustard Sauce:
1. In a bowl, blend 1-1/2 tbsp butter, 1-1/2 tbsp Dijon mustard.
2. Remove from heat; add 1 tbsp tarragon vinegar.
3. Stir in 1/4 cup sour cream and 1/4 tsp dried tarragon.
4. Season to taste with salt, black pepper, and red pepper.
